initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT lap_positions.lap_type, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM lap_positions
JOIN races_ext ON lap_positions.race_id = races_ext.race_id
JOIN retirements ON lap_positions.race_id = retirements.race_id AND lap_positions.driver_id = retirements.driver_id AND lap_positions.lap = retirements.lap
JOIN pit_stops ON lap_positions.race_id = pit_stops.race_id AND lap_positions.driver_id = pit_stops.driver_id AND lap_positions.lap = pit_stops.lap
WHERE races_ext.is_pit_data_available = 1
GROUP BY lap_positions.lap_type;

SELECT lp.lap_type, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM lap_positions lp
JOIN races_ext re ON lp.race_id = re.race_id
WHERE re.is_pit_data_available = 1
GROUP BY lp.lap_type;

SELECT lp.lap_type, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM lap_positions lp
JOIN races_ext re ON lp.race_id = re.race_id
WHERE re.is_pit_data_available = 1
GROUP BY lp.lap_type;

SELECT lap_type, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM lap_positions
JOIN races_ext ON lap_positions.race_id = races_ext.race_id
WHERE races_ext.is_pit_data_available = 1
GROUP BY lap_type;

SELECT lap_positions.lap_type, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM lap_positions
JOIN races_ext ON lap_positions.race_id = races_ext.race_id
JOIN retirements ON lap_positions.race_id = retirements.race_id
JOIN pit_stops ON lap_positions.race_id = pit_stops.race_id
WHERE races_ext.is_pit_data_available = 1
GROUP BY lap_positions.lap_type;

FROM lap_positions lp
